description: Update Campus page: (1) Change "Fractal Bootcamp & Tech Hub" to "Fractal Accelerator" (or similar — rename bootcamp references to accelerator). (2) Add "Want to host an event at Fractal? title: Campus page: rename bootcamp to accelerator, add host CTA, fix JetBrains casing
